_doc: Unglued (UGL) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/ugl.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 38C / 22U / 28R / 0M. Collation: sequential, 10x11 sheets. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Silver-border 'Un-' set. Small set (smaller than a normal small set). 6 token cards collated as uncommons. Printed in USA. No foils (pre-1999). 48 packs per box.

draft.tagline: 6 commons · 2 uncommons · 1× rare · 1 basic land · no foil
